zh.lifeSummary: 當William Marshal Earl of Pembroke於1146年5月12日出生在英國威爾斯布洛可爾布洛可時，他的父親John FitzGilbert40歲，母親Sibyl de Salisbury19歲。他於1189年8月8日與Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke在英國米德萊可倫敦結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1217年登記服兵役。他去世於1219年5月14日在英國奧可福爾享年73歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦 馮 坦普爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Marshal Earl of Pembroke于1146年5月12日出生在英国威尔斯布洛可爾布洛可时，他的父亲John FitzGilbert40岁，母亲Sibyl de Salisbury19岁。他于1189年8月8日与Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke在英国米德萊可倫敦结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1217年登记服兵役。他去世于1219年5月14日在英国奧可福爾享年73岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦 馮 坦普爾。

nameMeanings.name: Marshal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Marshall  .

variants.name: Marshall
meanings: English: usually an occupational name ‘farrier’, occasionally a status name ‘chief official of a royal household or court; a high officer of state’, from Middle English mareshal and Old French maresc(h)al. An even wider range of meanings is found in some other languages: compare for example Polish Marszałek (see Marszalek ). This name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century. It is also borne by Jews, presumably as an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When William Marshal Earl of Pembroke was born on 12 May 1146, in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, John FitzGilbert, was 40 and his mother, Sibyl de Salisbury, was 19. He married Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke on 8 August 1189, in London, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. He registered for military service in 1217. He died on 14 May 1219, in Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 73, and was buried in London The Temple, Middlesex, England.

fr.Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, , Wales: Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Marshal Earl of Pembroke est né le 12 mai 1146, à Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, John FitzGilbert, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Sibyl de Salisbury, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke le 8 août 1189, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1217. Il est décédé le 14 mai 1219, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à London The Temple, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Marshal Earl of Pembroke am 12. Mai 1146 in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John FitzGilbert 40 und seine Mutter Sibyl de Salisbury 19. Er hat am 8. August 1189 in London, Middlesex, England Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er hat sich 1217 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 14. Mai 1219 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Oxfordshire, England und wurde in London The Temple, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Marshal Earl of Pembroke è nato il il 12 maggio 1146 nel Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John FitzGilbert, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Sibyl de Salisbury, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke il 8 agosto 1189, nel London, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1217. Morì il 14 maggio 1219, nel Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a London The Temple, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Marshal Earl of Pembrokeが1146年5月12日にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアペンブロクで生まれた時，父John FitzGilbertは40歳，母Sibyl de Salisburyは19歳であった。1189年8月8日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンでIsabel de Clare Countess of Pembrokeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1217年に兵役登録をした。彼は1219年5月14日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで73歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン ス テンプルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Marshal Earl of Pembroke(이)가 1146년 5월 12일 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 p브로크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John FitzGilbert(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibyl de Salisbury(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1189년 8월 8일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1217년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1219년 5월 14일 영국 스퍼드실르에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던 테 템일에 묻혔다.

pt.12 May 1146–14 May 1219: 12 de maio de 1146–14 de maio de 1219
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Marshal Earl of Pembroke nasceu em 12 de maio de 1146, em Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, John FitzGilbert, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Sibyl de Salisbury, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke em 8 de agosto de 1189, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1217. Ele faleceu em 14 de maio de 1219, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em London The Temple, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ro.Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, , Wales: Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Marshal Earl of Pembroke родился 12 мая 1146 г. в местности пемброк, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John FitzGilbert было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibyl de Salisbury, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke 8 августа 1189 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. В 1217 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 14 мая 1219 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности лондон т темпл, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.12 May 1146–14 May 1219: 12 de mayo de 1146–14 de mayo de 1219
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Marshal Earl of Pembroke nació el 12 de mayo de 1146, en Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, John FitzGilbert, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Sibyl de Salisbury, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke el 8 de agosto de 1189, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1217. Murió el 14 de mayo de 1219, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en London The Temple, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
